title: Chengdu, Sichuan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chengdu, Sichuan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chengdu is a city in Sichuan with a population of 16,330,000. The capital of Sichuan province, famous for its spicy cuisine, giant panda breeding center, and laid-back lifestyle with a growing tech sector.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
